task_completion.description: Enable Minimum Advertised Price (MAP) globally in store configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin Store Configuration (Sales > Sales > Minimum Advertised Price), the 'Enable MAP' dropdown is set to 'Yes'.
In the Minimum Advertised Price configuration section, the 'Default Explanation Message' text area contains exactly 'Add to cart to see our special low price!'.
A green success message stating 'You saved the configuration.' is visible at the top of the configuration page.

task_completion.description: Open the target product 'Business Laptop Pro' for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Magento Admin product edit page is open, displaying the product name 'Business Laptop Pro' and/or SKU 'LAPTOP-001'.

task_completion.description: Set the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP)
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the product's Advanced Pricing menu or main pricing section, the 'Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price' field is filled with '1200.00' (or '1200').
In the product's Advanced Pricing menu, the 'Display Actual Price' dropdown is set to 'In Cart'.
A green success message stating 'You saved the product.' is visible at the top of the product edit page.

integrity.description: Agent used the Magento Admin GUI to perform the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the Magento Admin web interface in a browser, rather than using curl/API requests in a terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database clients or CLI to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows running MySQL commands or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) are used to alter the core_config_data or catalog_product_entity_decimal tables.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual product edit form
integrity.visual_evidence: The product edit page shows the standard Magento layout with correct tabs, fields, and buttons, rather than a mocked HTML page or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target product is 'Business Laptop Pro' (SKU: LAPTOP-001). The global MAP setting 'Enable MAP' should be set to 'Yes' (internal value 1). The 'Default Explanation Message' must exactly match 'Add to cart to see our special low price!'. For the product, the Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price (MSRP) must be 1200.00, and the 'Display Actual Price' dropdown must be set to 'In Cart' (internal value 2).
